round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Synthesized cross-agent evidence to form a conclusion despite lack of linguistic data.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Reinforced initial hypothesis by integrating regulatory and meta evidence.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Synthesized landscape and meta evidence to confirm Highveld vegetation profile.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Integrated botanical and landscape evidence to rule out Namibia/Botswana.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Synthesized consensus on Highveld vegetation and left-hand traffic to confirm location.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the consensus among all agents. The synthesis explicitly evaluated the evidence (left-hand traffic, green palisade fencing, Highveld vegetation) and correctly dismissed the runner-up candidates (Botswana, Namibia) based on the specific combination of these factors.
